snippets.comment: Very nice and very welcoming. You can tell she genuinely cares about her students and makes the classroom environment very fun. Overall, it was a very enjoyable class and I'm going to miss it:')

I love this professor and class, this class made me know many things about me and helped me decide on a major as long as an education plan. The group projects were so fun, i met so many beautiful, funny people in the class.

Though it was a short semester with Mrs Novasky, I can definitely say I had fun and enjoyed going to her class every single week. Learned a lot about myself because of her, if I had the opportunity to have her as my professor for any other school subject, I would absolutely have the motivation to sh
